extraction.one_line_summary: DE MARCHI Alessandro attacked solo before final climb summit, refusing to let strong sprinter RESTREPO catch him, winning by gap on descent despite admitting poor legs
tactical_patterns: DE MARCHI forced early summit attack knowing RESTREPO would out-sprint him, prioritizing descent gap over energy conservation.
Education First muscled the front in rough weather conditions, suggesting team targets deteriorating conditions for aggressive racing.
Lotto-Jumbo paced defensively to prevent GC group splitting from PINOT's breakaway, neutralizing 19-second potential virtual lead shift.
PINOT's breakaway attempt with 2:33 deficit failed when main GC teams unified, showing top teams won't allow dangerous climbers breaks.

rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: Won despite self-admitting poor legs by superior tactical positioning, first win in 3 years signals rediscovered race-reading ability
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Failed to gain time from breakaway despite 2:33 deficit and strong climbing credentials, GC groups now mark him aggressively
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Red jersey team allowed Lotto-Jumbo to control chase, suggesting confidence or unwillingness to burn own team
rider_signals.RESTREPO: negative: Strong enough to bridge to DE MARCHI but got out-maneuvered tactically, failed to force cooperation before finale
